characters.name: Bobby Cruz
characters.description: Bobby CruzGender:MaleOccupation:Police OfficerAffiliation:Santa Monica Police DepartmentSeasons:Season Four-Season FiveFirst Appearance:Glass HousesLast Appearance:S.N.A.F.U.Portrayed by:Mario Lopez  Bobby Cruz is a good-looking, intelligent officer, who was working security on a college campus. In good physical shape and mature for his age, he's in charge of his 15-year old sister, Teresa, after the death of their parents at the hands of a drunk driver. The killer beat the rap through his extensive political connections. Formerly an officer with the LAPD, he left the force after repeated incidents of "excessive force" in dealing with suspects on the streets. This is probably the result of the residual anger at the death of his parents.

characters.name: Chris Kelly
characters.description: Chris KellyGender:FemaleOccupation:Pilot/Police OfficerAffiliation:Santa Monica Police DepartmentSeasons:Season One-Season FiveFirst Appearance:PilotLast Appearance:S.N.A.F.U.Portrayed by:Darlene Vogel  Chris Kelly is an ambitious police officer, and former Naval pilot. But problems with her eyesight forced her to leave the Navy. She instead choose to join theSanta Monica Police Department. She started in the department as a Public Relations officer, but after an intense chase and capture of a suspect gives her the choice, she decides to joinPac Blue.

characters.name: Cory McNamara
characters.description: Cory McNamaraGender:FemaleOccupation:Police OfficerAffiliation:Santa Monica Police DepartmentSeasons:Season One-Season FiveFirst Appearance:PilotLast Appearance:S.N.A.F.U.Portrayed by:Paula Trickey  Corey comes from a multi-generational family of cops. Her grandfather, father and brother, all served in the SMPD. She's a reliable, by-the-book bike cop who takes her job seriously but still has room for a sense of humor.

characters.name: T.C. Callaway
characters.description: T.C. CallawayTerence "T.C." CallawayGender:MaleOccupation:Police OfficerAffiliation:Santa Monica Police DepartmentSeasons:Season One-Season FiveFirst Appearance:PilotLast Appearance:S.N.A.F.U.Portrayed by:Jim Davidson  T.C. Callaway is currently the Lieutenant in charge of the Santa Monica Bike Beach Patrol.  A Zen surfer, his hobbies include restoring classic muscle cars from the sixties and early seventies.
